channel.name: transactions
channel.topic: Simple log to report and announce league transactions.

messages.content: Members of the media can break actual FA signings here and the LG will keep a running tab of who goes where. It's viewable to all but we are keeping the posting to LG only, please use #press-conference when discussing where you are going to sign.
The Henrik Omegas sign Hank Murphy
George Ewell returns home and signs with the Peregrines
The Sunnydale Slayers sign Master Cashier
The Cincinnati Redlegs re-sign the K leader himself, Ronald Eagle
Haraldo Mckenzie signs with Rub A Chikin and the Portland Pioneers!
The Cincinnati Redlegs have also signed Lawrence Wiseman
Hans Ali has signed with the Pioneers
Ecliptic Astrum has signed with the Slayers
Jimmy Johns has signed with the Lonestar Pumpjacks
Clive "The Future" Babineaux has signed with The Lonestar Pumpjacks
Ricky Vaughn signs with the Sunnydale Slayers
Magic Simmons signs with the Blubs Bay Flappy Bois
Devin Arianna signs with Henrik Omega's yet to be named team
Blue Moon Barthelemy returns to Alameda
Dominus Nominus signs the Big Boirilla, Blue Llama
Angel Leon joins Ruba Chikin and the Portland Pioneers
Robin Reynolds signed with the Pioneers I think
JP Panik was mean to me, and then signed with the Peregrines
Also signed with the Peregrines, reported All-Star snub, Miss Bats!
The Pioneers use nepostism to sign Billtopher Gatestopher
Dick Woolridge Jr. signed with Portland.
